name: 3 Old Men
description: 3 Old Men is an installation of an octagonal, multicursal labyrinth. Burners are invited to enter the labyrinth for meditation throughout the burn. During the ritual offered at SOLAR NOON, an hour BEFORE SUNSET, and SUNSET, at three of the four exits an officiant (Old Man) offers an experience. Project details can be found at http://goo.gl/C9jJDD

name: 3rd Aid
description: Creature Comforts and hippy repair of all varieties to Un-Fuck Your Burn!

name: Acrodesiac Lunartics Tribe
description: Acrodesiac Lunartics, Knoxville's AcroYoga Community, is bringing all things AcroYoga to To the Moon! Join us is our shade structure for morning yoga, group meditation, Thai Massage workshops, and AcroYoga Jams! We will provide shade, mats, and also have our altar set up. Come hang out, meditate, and even bring something for our altar. Balance out the Solar of the day with Lunar offerings such as sound healing, Yin and Thai Massage. Check out the flight manual for our class offerings!

name: Alien Goddess Garden
description: Stop in and relax at the Alien Goddess Garden. Theme Camp Artists have created Alien Goddesses from repurposed materials for your viewing pleasure.  Everyone is invited to suggest a name for each of the alien goddesses our team has displayed. Visit during the day for a relaxing rest amongst our beings and stop back by at night to experience the goddesses in their glowing state of awesomeness. Sitting areas and lounging areas are open to all. Fun little shares are available to all and can be found in the lounging areas.

name: Amanita Morel Support
description: Step into our enchanted mushroom wonderland and experience the ultimate morel support system! Whether it be chilling at our lounge area, drinking some mushroom coffee, or trying different varieties of mushrooms. Our mushroom garden paths will light your way at night and our mellow teas will calm you and open your eyes through the day. Come receive some support along your journey!

name: Bacchanalia
description: Sample a taste of the finer things with bacchanalia, feast your eyes and your bodies with snacks of all kinds

name: Be the Reason Someone Smiles Today
description: Be the Reason Someone Smiles Today!

name: Brown Eye presents Cuddle Sluts
description: Cuddle Puddle and Lasers

name: Burntastic Barbie
description: Burntastic Barbie is a meta experience to encourage us to think about what we are doing and experiencing at the burn. It gives an easy format for direct participation and immediacy, encouraging participants to stop and play or even adopt a doll as a prop for further adventures.

name: CAF (Cool as Fuck)
description: A camp to help you keep cool and have a beverage

name: Camp Pretty Lights
description: Come, be dazzled by our Pretty Lights and Shadowbox with friends both new and old. Grab an elixir from the Bar-do during special events. We are an original all-purpose hippie trap and beacon of luminescence.

name: Camp Procrastination
description: We were going to write a cool-sounding description but got busy... it’s on our to-do list, really... But you can come by any time and absolve yourself of your *own* procrastination! Write down things you’ve been putting off onto one of our blank “to-do” lists. We’ll burn these in the temple burn... or maybe the next weekend in our backyard... depends on which one we get around to... to help give energy to the things you want to accomplish. If we’re around when you come by, feel free to sit and visit for a bit, and share some beverages with us. :)

name: Camp R & R
description: Swing by Camp R & R  between 5 - 8 PM each day for some rubs & tasty mystery treats that start with the letter R. Ravioli? Ranch dip? Red Velvet Cake? Raspberries? Ramen? Rollos? Raisins? You have to come by to find out what's in store! We'll have multiple massage chairs/tables in action with a chill hang out space for relaxin' to the maxin'! :)

name: Casmp: Comeoniwanna
description: Comeoniwanna a solute your shorts style summer camp

name: Center Camp
description: Center Camp at To The Moon

name: Chonktown
description: We have 2 rules in Chonktown. 1: Don't die. 2: Be Groovy, or leave. Everything else is welcome.

name: Crappy Bar
description: Come for a crappy drink.  Leave because of the crappy jokes.  But don't be hatin' on our crappy music 'cuz we just happy to be here...maybe.

name: Crystal Hive
description: Come relax by the fire late at night, or take a nap in our shaded hammocks during that day. The Crystal Hive welcomes all wanderers. We offer comfort, conversations, refreshments, and games. Stop by for a scoop of crystals.

name: Dabs@LabCity
description: Herbal lung butter massages @4:20 & 7:10 at our derb lounge

name: Dolls To The Wall
description: TTM's Premiere Creepy Baby Doll Camp - Come for our famous Hurricane Shots or the delights of the snark-filled servings from COFFEE BAR, and stay for the relaxing chill space under the ever-present gaze of our creepy baby doll children!

name: Dr Buzz and Associates
description: Dr Buzz is musical performer who also teaches neo-shamanism

name: Electric Glitter Cafe
description: Home of the Electric Glitter Cafe, a multi-room fully enclosed fuzzy building full of wonder and light paired with Vulture Mansion Dance Temple of Darkness,  an outdoor dance and lounge space with Music and events

name: Entheoasis
description: A chill oasis at the Moon, ideal to re-integrate and elevate you. Enter the Yurt: A vibrant space with plushies & blankets over soft foam pads. Enter the Tea House: A grounding space with musical instruments & sitting pillows over a furry rug. We invite you to enjoy our tea service, play at our jam sessions, get your beauty sleep fix, have a conversation or make a connection. Low-key Ethno-house, Minimal vibes, psychedelic dub & Folktronica music played throughout the Burn.

name: Eyeclipse
description: Headroom and Little Bohemia have joined forces to form one large sound camp which will feature a new stage design, full bar, and lots of fire.

name: FuZZy WuZZiEs
description: We are a camp dedicated to helping you get in touch with all aspects of the our inner child. Come play with us, let’s be friends!

name: Georgia Peanuts
description: Wikipedia says, boiled peanuts are widely consumed and commercially available in an area of the Southern United States. That describes us exactly. Guests are welcome to enjoy a cup full of boiled, salty nuts. (Food Allergy Warning: May contain peanut products.). If you are needing a different kind of help, our favorite peanut, Lucy, will be offering psychiatric assistance at her booth.

name: Heathen Life
description: Heathen Life is excited to return to the moon and share our cocktails and participatory space with our fellow mooninites while enveloping you in a warm blanket of bass filled wiggly air waves.

name: Hippie Haven
description: Hippie Haven offers a place to hang out and if you are a lucky, a slice of Pizza.

name: I love you
description: We are in space. No one knows what's going on. I love you.

name: JohnniePopsicles
description: Popsicles 24/7!!!

name: JohnniePopsicles Outpost
description: Popsicles 24/7!!!

name: Just People
description:
Just People has been around a few years. Our theme? We do what we like.

If you want to reduce us to labels, we are a bar, a DJ booth, a dancefloor, a pop-up entertainment show, but we're not just labels, we're Just People. Tired of boots and cats? What about booze and hats. Don't be bored at a bar, come draw at a bar. We are where the only unce unce unce comes from a German Sparkle Party, and where you might get offered a Ham Slam if you ask the right questions.

We're a reptile house. We're a star-spangled rodeo. Sometimes we're a 4-minute track of cats meowing. We're the place you start your morning with a mimosa and end your night with an expanded vocabulary. We as a Camp ask the question, Is it fun? If it is, we do it. If it's not, we cover it in liquor and do it anyway.

name: Kamp Khaos
description: Hello there! Khaos here. My troupe of misfits and I have landed upon this realm to bring you a sight beyond sanity! Kamp Khaos! A fun filled family friendly place to drag your siblings, friends, or whomever and beat them in the face! We are a fully immersive combat-oriented gladiator event just itching for you to take the first step unto GLORY!! Just bring on down whomever pissed in your Wheaties and show them what's what. Because you my friends are the SHOW! This is a stress relief and frustration letting activity with adult bopper weapons and well-fortified armor. Feel free to let them have it as we have what it takes to go the distance! With the latest in Arms, Armor, and other bloodletting accessories at your fingertips visit wrath upon others! Enter a wacky realm in Kamp Khaos where you can take your best friend into the Arena and revel in the roar of the crowd while you abruptly introduce them to the mat. Then enjoy the thrills of doing so again, and again, and again. Or just kick them and others out of the ring and be crowned KING, or QUEEN, of the Arena! \n    Do you have what it takes to claw your way to the top? Can you, the wandering hipster, crush the competition and proclaim yourself Champion of the Tournament!?! Do you have it in you to take on grandma and her flying dentures of doom? Can you survive the humiliation of that walker grinding your bones to dust as you lie defeated and broken on the floor? WHO KNOWS?! Come let us find out in the realms of Kamp Khaos where everyone wins!

name: Lunatic Lounge
description: We would like to Willfully Welcome you to the Lunatic Lounge!! Snag a shot from our baddass bar and snag a seat in our lovely lounge. Stay a while and share a smile after you've walked a mile. You never know who, (or What) you will find at the lounge.

name: McNasty's Camp Exile
description: McNasty's Camp Exile is all inclusive and welcomes those excommunicated from other camps after a full vetting and core camp member vote.  Our camp will provide DJ events, Espresso by Espresso Joe and Hot Noodles (Hot Nudes) for those passer by folks.

name: Medical
description: Medical at To The Moon

name: Meowy WOWy
description: Pspspsps, here kitty kitty! Embrace your inner divine feline as you play, swing, lounge, and get scritches in our 32’ geodesic dome. Knock things off shelves, chase lasers, paw at toys, create cat costume accessories, receive PAWsitive affirmations, and maybe even add a few new cool cats and kittens to your PAWsse. Experience and participate in performance art on the catwalk that'll leave you purring with delight!

name: Muddy Buddies
description: Muddy Buddies is a Spa Themed camp nestled next to a waterfall on Phils To The Moon Property that provides Dead Sea Mud Bath Treatments. Body Paint Contests are hosted daily at 2pm. We also are the founders of the Red Flag Game. You don't want this flag, it's moop. If you find a red flag in your camp you have to extricate it to another camp...they may be gps tracked...you might be trolled for having a red flag in your camp post burn...

name: Netflixxx & Chill
description:
Welcome to Netflixxx & Chill, the ultimate destination for cinephiles, entertainment enthusiasts, and those who know how to unwind in style! Our camp is a haven for those who appreciate the magic of cinema and the joy of communal viewing experiences.

Camp Lounge:
Step into our camp lounge, where a colossal 10' screen awaits to showcase a curated selection of films and television shows. From 10 am until 4 am, immerse yourself in the world of storytelling, laughter, and drama. Grab a seat, relax on our comfortable bean bags, and let the cinematic journey begin.

Daytime Activities:
During the day, Netflixxx & Chill transforms into a hub of excitement with various activities to engage your mind and creativity. Participate in our Film Trivia Competition and showcase your knowledge of the silver screen. Join the Impression Competition, where your ability to mimic your favorite characters could win a fabulous prize. And don't forget to bring your A-game to the Costume Contest, where the most creative outfits will be rewarded!

Late-Night Entertainment:
As the sun sets, our camp comes alive with late-night entertainment. On Friday and Saturday nights, experience the tantalizing world of adult burlesque-style performances in the lounge or be mesmerized by the mesmerizing fire-spinning displays outside. It's a sensory delight that adds a touch of the extraordinary to your Burning Man experience.

Culinary Delights:
At Netflixxx & Chill, we believe in the importance of good food and drink. Join us for 'first come, first serve' breakfast and dinner on select days, served in a communal atmosphere that fosters connection and camaraderie. Throughout the day, indulge in a selection of alcoholic beverages, tea, and coffee to keep you energized and refreshed.

Community and Connection:
Our camp is not just about watching films; it's about building connections with like-minded individuals who share a passion for entertainment, creativity, and the Burning Man spirit. Join us for a unique and unforgettable experience that combines the best of cinema, art, and community at Netflixxx & Chill.

name: Nostalgia Under the Moonlight
description: Come in and let your inner child out. Do you have a longing for an opportunity to play with toys from your childhood? (Or maybe your parent's childhood?) When you need a little down time at the burn, come step back in time with us and delight in building a village from Lincoln Logs, setup a wooden train track, and populate your imaginary forest with toy animals. Or maybe you want to color on the walls or play a simple game of pick up sticks with a friend? Open 24/7 for solo or small group play when you are on sensory overload and need a reset.

name: Not Sure
description: We are Not Sure. But we are busy BEEs from the north, buzzin around looking for our Hive and the honey holes.

name: NTT Effigy Build Crew
description: Multi-Generation Gods, Goddesses, and the like... plus popsicles and if you are really really good/bad(interpret as you please) some bomb ass food... if you know how to get in where you fit in you know how to break bread with us. We came, we built, and now we play. If we aren't here we are probably tending to the Effigy. Much Love Fam.

name: Nudie Misfits
description: Lounge for the loud and irreverent that promotes non-sexual nudity.

name: Pixel Swarm
description: Camp Pixel Swarm - Home of the Drone Light Show!

name: Ranger HQ
description: Headquarters for Rangers

name: Renegade Sound
description: Just making music.

name: Sensua (formerly Herhisensua)
description: Fun exploration of all things sensual

name: Spectral Subverse
description: The Spectral Subverse is a veritable village stocked with sensorial delights and far-out fun. Escape to a landing pad with dancing lights in all directions. Indulge your eyes on luxurious luminosity; watch as the waves and particles prance on the ceiling of the dome. Let your senses enjoy the serenity of shade and cool air as you make interstellar connections with those in your orbit at Space Dome, chill out in our groovy Big Top Tent, or step outside to a party that is out of this world!

name: Spoon Commune
description: We're here to make life a little easier for everyone. Oops! Forgot to pack something? We have it in the Flip Flop Forgot Shop. Come take what you need! Gear broken? Stop by for a fix. Tired? Settle into our cozy living room for a moment. Run out of spoons? We have SPOONS!!! We're also accepting gear donations to make life easier for our unhoused neighbors back home.

name: Temple of The Tea Monks
description: The Temple of the Tea Monks is an inclusive gathering space for all sentient beings including humans, robots, and crickets. A tea monk’s brew is made using the finest teas, herbs and flowers. Come rest in the sanctuary of warmth and peace. If you choose to stay, a tea monk will offer their listening ears and brew a fresh pot just for you and your friends.

name: That's Pretty Neat!
description: We are a group of makers, scientists, artists, nerds, thinkers, and weirdos who are landing on the moon with a desire to share the things we love with other Lunartics! Come learn about BATS from a wildlife conservationist and see a bat detector in action! Join our fiber-crafts circle one afternoon, where you can crochet, knit, cross-stitch, or just sit around in the shade and gossip. Are you a new burner? Come to our Virgin Orientation event and get tips from the old hats! All this and more can be found at That's Pretty Neat!\n\nOur event/activity/discussion space will be open to other people who might have something to share That's Pretty Neat! If you are interested in hosting an event in our space, email barefootbarbaloots@gmail.com to get on the schedule!

name: The 5th Quest
description: We are the keepers of The 5th Quest - the journey home to the Center of Being. To facilitate this process, we wish to invite you to play with us. We shall design a quest in real time, in accordance with the Nine Arches, and unleash our creativity and adventure as never before!\n\nLong Live the QUEST!

name: The Broken Drum
description: Come grab a frosty brew in everyone's favorite cozy little pub, The Broken Drum!  Just watch out for those snake farmers...

name: The Church of Cheesus Crust
description: At the Church of Cheesus Crust, our mission is to spread joy, unity, and culinary enlightenment through the celebration of the divine union of grilled cheese and soup. We embrace the sacred flavors that nourish both body and soul, fostering a community of love, laughter, and shared cheesy goodness. Through our gatherings and sacraments, we aim to ignite a passion for life's simple pleasures and connect individuals to the delectable grace of Cheesus.

name: The Disputed Flame
description: The Disputed Flame is a hodgepodge mishmash collection of nerdy, kinky, and neurodivergent burners from all over. We have been established for two years at The Love Burn in Miami, FL. We offer arts and crafts, a hangout lounge, and fun foods. We love to entertain and offer a mocktail & hydration bar to the burner community. Bring a cup and some good vibes!

name: The Effigy
description: The Effigy at To The Moon

name: The French Quarter
description: Bonjour! Come visit us to relax and taste cheese, bread and wine and other delicious food. Also feel free to bring your own if you like to have other discover your favorites! FrenchChris and MiniMe

name: The Fun Guys
description: We’re just havin’ fun guys… find us at the 17ft inflatable mushroom. Scheduled sessions of yoga, ecstatic dance, live music, and more. \nMeditation and hang in the Goddess lounge with tarot cards and other energy reading tools, and massage gear. Kid friendly-games and activities.

name: The Green Room
description: A karaoke lounge where it's easy being green. Sing your silliest, sexiest, spoonerific-est tunes. Drop trou and meow!

name: The Grotto
description: The Grotto at To The Moon

name: The Midnight Triumvirate’s Electrified Lounge
description: Are friends electric? They can be here. Wonder junkies and Late night conspirators welcome here!

name: The Sacred Womb Portal
description: The Sacred Womb Portal is a safe space for womb bearers both former and current to sit in circle and share their personal experiences with their womb portal.

name: The Temple
description: The Temple at To The Moon

name: The Tilted Hanger
description: The Tilted Hanger invites all (radicle inclusion) to engage (participate) in (radical self expression) in finding your true burner self! We believe it is our duty (civic responsibility) to guide you in your freedom to receive without a price (de-commodified), receive without having to return (gifted) an experience from your community (communal effort), as we challenge you to become (self reliant) and to (leave no trace) ie. TAKE YOUR UNDIES HOME WITH YOU (immediately)\nOpen Daily 11am-4pm

name: The Witches Tavern
description:
The Witches Tavern is a magical place where all travelers are welcome! You can find a friendly tea-tender to whip up your magic blend of herbal tea, tell you a joke or a tale. If you're hungry, The cauldron is aways full of allergen friendly soup.  Enjoy the low lighting, fire and acoustic only vibes. 
Join us for high tea at 4:20 each day! 
🎩Bring your fanciest hats!🧙‍♀ 
Cheers! ☕

name: Train Station
description: We are the future camp for the Love Train art car!! We will be providing different waters to be a hydration station. We will also have information on our project, and will be talking about it with anyone interested!!! Come by and hydrate, and cool off from the heat!

name: Tree Star City
description: Come get a little unbalanced among the stars as you connect with other astronauts in our galaxy of hammocks! Napping is highly encouraged for all weary space explorers in the nebula. Please no sharp objects, open flames, or bouncing in the lunar landings. Keep all space cadets safe by following capacity limits. You won't need a multi-pass to set your soul to supernova in Tree Star City...all aliens are welcome in our universe!

name: Unity Camp
description: Unity Camp (former Fort Dicks)

name: Unknown
description: Events that have no location, are in open camping or mobile.

name: Wild Weed Walks
description: Canopy with signage Wild Weed Walks and Learn How to Forage. Classes, demonstrations, and food will be available all day.

name: World Spirits
description: A bar suited for those wanderlust souls. We serve unique spirits from around the world and the stories that go with them.
